description_long: This is a light-colored, wide-brimmed hat with a flat, circular brim and a tall, cylindrical crown featuring a distinctive crease along the top. The hat is primarily off-white or cream in color, with a broad, brown band wrapping around the base of the crown, adding a touch of contrast and style. The surface appears to be made of felt or a similar soft material, giving it a matte, slightly textured finish. Subtle lines and shading on the crown suggest gentle wear or intentional design details. The hat's overall structure is firm but not rigid, maintaining its shape while offering some flexibility. This style is reminiscent of a classic fedora or gaucho hat, often seen in urban fashion or worn for sun protection.
description: A wide-brimmed, off-white felt hat with a tall, creased crown and a broad brown band around its base. The surface is matte and slightly textured, giving it a stylish, urban look.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the tall, creased crown and the brown band wrapping around the left side.
description_view_1: Direct side view highlighting the full width of the brim and the prominent brown band encircling the crown.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back of the crown and the continuation of the brown band.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the crown's crease and the uninterrupted off-white felt surface.
attribute_crown_shape: tall, flat-topped with a central crease
